isi.lyrics:

Romanization

My paradise
My morning light
Don’t feel the way they did
Lately
One kiss at night
No wings to fly
So far away from bliss oh

You keep saying you’re not mad
I keep disregarding facts
We keep saying nothing’s changed
Knowing nothing stays the same
Are we living in the past
Just so we can make it last
And am I supposed to run away from home

You dance like I remember baby blue
Still looks good it always did on you
Oh and there’s no easy way to lose
A love that you get used to

My loyalty
Is not wavering

Now every touch
Is not enough
